headline: eBay Joins SAIL As Stock Trades Below Targets And Valuation Estimate
summary: eBay has joined the new Shared AI License Foundation as a board observer, alongside companies such as Anthropic, Genentech, IBM, Meta, and Microsoft. SAIL is designed to support open collaboration and non exclusive patent licensing for AI foundation models. The initiative aims to encourage shared development of core AI technologies that could influence how eBay and other firms use AI in their products and services. For investors watching NasdaqGS:EBAY, this move comes as the stock trades at...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on eBay, Lowers Price Target to $117
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Nathan Feather   maintains eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $119 to $117.
